children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to subsection (c), the Commissioner may make payments in each State to the protection and advocacy system established pursuant to part C of title I of the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act ( et seq.) for the purpose of providing services to disabled beneficiaries.42 U.S.C. 60411See References in Text note below.1
information and advice about obtaining vocational rehabilitation and employment services; and
advocacy or other services that a disabled beneficiary may need to secure, maintain, or regain gainful employment.

children.heading: Application
children.label: c Application
children.text: In order to receive payments under this section, a protection and advocacy system shall submit an application to the Commissioner, at such time, in such form and manner, and accompanied by such information and assurances as the Commissioner may require.

children.label: ii
children.text: ⅓ of 1 percent of the amount available for payments under this section; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a protection and advocacy system located in Guam, American Samoa, the United States Virgin Islands, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, $50,000.

children.heading: Inflation adjustment
children.label: 2 Inflation adjustment
children.text: For each fiscal year in which the total amount appropriated to carry out this section exceeds the total amount appropriated to carry out this section in the preceding fiscal year, the Commissioner shall increase each minimum payment under subparagraphs (A) and (B) of paragraph (1) by a percentage equal to the percentage increase in the total amount so appropriated to carry out this section.

children.heading: Annual report
children.label: e Annual report
children.text: Each protection and advocacy system that receives a payment under this section shall submit an annual report to the Commissioner and the Ticket to Work and Work Incentives Advisory Panel established under section 101(f) of the Ticket to Work and Work Incentives Improvement Act of 1999 on the services provided to individuals by the system.

children.heading: Allocation of payments
children.label: 1 Allocation of payments
children.text: Payments under this section shall be made from amounts made available for the administration of subchapter II and amounts made available for the administration of subchapter XVI, and shall be allocated among those amounts as appropriate.

children.heading: Carryover
children.label: 2 Carryover
children.text: Any amounts allotted for payment to a protection and advocacy system under this section for a fiscal year shall remain available for payment to or on behalf of the protection and advocacy system until the end of the succeeding fiscal year.

children.heading: Commissioner
children.label: 1 Commissioner
children.text: The term “Commissioner” means the Commissioner of Social Security.

children.label: A
children.text: who is a disabled beneficiary as defined in ;section 1320b–19(k)(2) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: who is receiving a cash payment described in or a supplementary payment described in (without regard to whether such payment is paid by the Commissioner pursuant to an agreement under or under );section 1382e(a) of this titlesection 212(a)(3) of Public Law 93–66section 1382e(a) of this titlesection 212(b) of Public Law 93–66

children.label: C
children.text: who, pursuant to , is considered to be receiving benefits under subchapter XVI of this chapter; orsection 1382h(b) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: who is entitled to benefits under part A of subchapter XVIII of this chapter by reason of the penultimate sentence of .section 426(b) of this title

children.heading: Protection and advocacy system
children.label: 3 Protection and advocacy system
children.text: The term “protection and advocacy system” means a protection and advocacy system established pursuant to part C of title I of the Developmental Disabilities Assistance and Bill of Rights Act ( et seq.).42 U.S.C. 60411

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: h Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $7,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2000 through 2011.
